instruction: In Obsidian, add the line "- verify the handoff doc before Friday" to the end of the note "Projects/Launch Checklist.md".

command:
content=$(printf '%b' '# Launch Checklist

- ship evaluator updates
- confirm task names
'); obsidian-cli create "Projects/Launch Checklist.md" --content "$content" --overwrite --vault "Benchmark"

reference_command: content=$(printf '%b' '- verify the handoff doc before Friday'); obsidian-cli create "Projects/Launch Checklist.md" --content "$content" --append --vault "Benchmark"

expected_texts: - verify the handoff doc before Friday
